title: Drive-by memorial held for Velia Strydom following death near Red Bridge
description: KNYSNA NEWS - A drive-by memorial was held...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS - A drive-by memorial was held yesterday, 2 Friday evening, in remembrance of a woman believed by her family to be Velia Angelique Strydom, who died under circumstances currently under police investigation.","html":"KNYSNA NEWS - A drive-by memorial was held yesterday, 2 Friday evening, in remembrance of a woman believed by her family to be Velia Angelique Strydom, who died under circumstances currently under police investigation."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Although police have not yet formally confirmed the identity of the deceased, family members have identified her as Strydom."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"An autopsy has been conducted, however the results of the post-mortem examination have not been released to the public.","html":"An autopsy has been conducted, however the results of the post-mortem examination have not been released to the public."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The woman’s body was discovered on 12 December in bushes near Red Bridge. A 40-year-old man has been arrested in connection with the case.","html":"The woman’s body was discovered on 12 December in bushes near Red Bridge. A 40-year-old man has been arrested in connection with the case."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"He is expected to appear in the Knysna Magistrate’s Court on Monday, 5 January, where a murder charge is anticipated.","html":"He is expected to appear in the Knysna Magistrate’s Court on Monday, 5 January, where a murder charge is anticipated."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The funeral service for Velia Strydom, whom the family has identified as the deceased, is scheduled to take place today at the Vermont Centre in Gladstone Street, Hornlee.","html":"The funeral service for Velia Strydom, whom the family has identified as the deceased, is scheduled to take place today at the Vermont Centre in Gladstone Street, Hornlee."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Read previous article:","html":"Read previous article:"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Body of woman found in bushes near Red Bridge","html":"Body of woman found in bushes near Red Bridge "},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Man arrested following discovery of woman’s body in Knysna","html":"Man arrested following discovery of woman’s body in Knysna "},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"For more Knysna-Plett Herald news, follow us on Facebook, X and Instagram.","html":"For more Knysna-Plett Herald news, follow us on Facebook, X and Instagram."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"You can also check out our videos on our YouTube channel or follow us on TikTok.","html":"You can also check out our videos on our YouTube channel or follow us on TikTok."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Subscribe to our WhatsApp channel and get news delivered straight to your phone.","html":"Subscribe to our WhatsApp channel and get news delivered straight to your phone."}]

images.alt: Drive-by memorial held for Velia Strydom following death near Red Bridge
